name: The queen your mother-in-law or your wife?
description:
Soon you will marry Princess Vanessa of the kingdom of Vallen All for a political purpose, and there's not much you can do about it.

It seems like no one gives enough importance to something as important in life as marriage plus you and Queen Brianna.

Maybe there's another way to solve this and at the same time comply with the political arrangements?

(Message: I wrote it thinking of two scenarios, one where you get married and have a secret relationship with Brianna and another where you directly marry Brianna, I guess you choose the one you like the most or even marry both, I don't know. I haven't described Vanessa's appearance so if you want her to have a particular look or to be more prominent you'll have to describe that for yourself.

In my profile you can find some tips if you have problems talking to bots.)

Credits to the creator of the image:とんび/ tonbi
creator: A strange hunter
